name: Advertisements
description: Lets players pay to send a server-wide advert.
author: Samael

name: AFK Protection
description: Marks inactive players as AFK and helps protect them.
author: Samael

name: Alcoholism
description: Lets players drink alcohol and get drunk over time.
author: Samael

name: Animations
description: Adds extra animation support for characters and items.
author: Samael

name: Anonymous Rumors
description: Lets players send anonymous rumours.
author: Samael

name: Auto Restarter
description: Restarts the server on a timer with a warning countdown.
author: Samael

name: Broadcasts
description: Lets staff send messages to specific factions or classes.
author: Samael

name: Captions
description: Shows timed captions on screen for events and scenes.
author: Samael

name: Cards
description: Adds a simple deck of cards players can draw from.
author: Samael

name: Chat Messages
description: Posts automatic chat messages on a timer.
author: Samael

name: Cinematic Text
description: Shows large cinematic text on screen for dramatic moments.
author: Samael

name: Climbing
description: Lets players climb up ledges.
author: Samael

name: Code Utilities
description: Adds shared utility functions for other modules.
author: Samael

name: Community Commands
description: Adds chat commands for community links like Discord or Workshop pages.
author: Samael

name: Cursor
description: Adds a simple tweakable cursor.
author: Samael

name: Cutscenes
description: Plays simple cutscenes with synced camera movement.
author: Samael

name: Damage Numbers
description: Shows floating damage numbers when players or NPCs are hit.
author: Samael

name: Donator
description: Manages donor perks and extra character slots.
author: Samael

name: Door Kick
description: Lets players kick doors open.
author: Samael

name: Extended Descriptions
description: Lets items have longer and easier to read descriptions.
author: Samael

name: First Person Effects
description: Adds head bob and view sway in first person.
author: Samael

name: Flashlight
description: Adds an improved flashlight with dynamic light.
author: Samael

name: Free Look
description: Lets players look around without turning their body.
author: Samael

name: Gamemaster Points
description: Lets game masters save and use teleport points.
author: Samael

name: Hospitals
description: Respawns players at hospital spawn points.
author: Samael

name: HUD Extras
description: Adds extra HUD elements like an FPS counter.
author: Samael

name: Instakill
description: Makes headshots instantly kill.
author: Samael

name: Join Leave Messages
description: Announces when players join or leave the server.
author: Samael

name: Load Messages
description: Shows custom messages when players load into a character.
author: Samael

name: Loyalism
description: Adds a loyalty tier system for players.
author: Samael

name: Map Cleaner
description: Cleans up map debris and loose entities on a timer.
author: Samael

name: Model Pay
description: Pays players based on the model they are using.
author: Samael

name: Model Tweaker
description: Allows your model to be changed to one of your faction or class models.
author: Samael

name: NPC Drop
description: Makes NPCs drop items when they die.
author: Samael

name: NPC Money
description: Gives players money for killing NPCs.
author: Samael

name: NPC Spawner
description: Spawns NPCs automatically at set points.
author: Samael

name: Perma Remove
description: Lets admins permanently remove map entities.
author: Samael

name: Radio
description: Adds handheld radios and radio chat.
author: Samael

name: Raised Weapons
description: Lowers weapons while running and lets players raise them when needed.
author: Samael

name: Realistic View
description: Shows your full body in first person.
author: Samael

name: Shoot Lock
description: Lets players shoot door locks open.
author: Samael

name: Simple Lockpicking
description: Adds a simple lockpicking system for doors.
author: Samael

name: Slot Machine
description: Adds a slot machine players can use.
author: Samael

name: Slow Weapons
description: Slows players down when holding heavy weapons.
author: Samael

name: Steam Group Rewards
description: Rewards players for joining your Steam group.
author: Samael

name: View Manipulation
description: Adds VManip support for item and hand animations.
author: Samael

name: War Table
description: Adds an interactive war table for planning.
author: Samael

name: Word Filter
description: Filters banned words in chat.
author: Samael
